# 1stStep.ai

1stStep.ai designs and builds premium websites, cinematic digital experiences, custom web products, dashboards, and native iOS prototypes for founders, businesses, and professionals.

Primary positioning: high-end websites and apps with clear creative direction, thoughtful motion, and production-ready development.

Primary conversion path:
- Website: https://www.1ststep.ai/
- Free App Idea Checker: https://www.1ststep.ai/app-idea-viability-checker.html
- App builds: https://www.1ststep.ai/services/app-builds.html
- MVP builds: https://www.1ststep.ai/services/mvp-builds.html
- Premium websites: https://www.1ststep.ai/services/websites.html
- Internal tools and integrations: https://www.1ststep.ai/services/internal-tools.html

Official profiles:
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/1ststep-ai/
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=61566833623507
- Google Business Profile: https://maps.app.goo.gl/x7XKauoXUwi2qfNdA
- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCynvog-XB0oFBigcrBvmxOg

Core services:
- Premium website design and development
- Cinematic motion and interaction design
- Custom web apps, dashboards, and SaaS first versions
- High-fidelity iOS product prototypes and SwiftUI direction
- Product integrations when the experience requires them
- Build strategy and first-version scope control

Important product:
- The App Idea Viability Checker gives prospects a first-pass MVP readiness score, recommended build path, risk breakdown, and next-step recommendation.

Portfolio accuracy:
- The Spot Cafe iOS work is a high-fidelity prototype and SwiftUI direction, not a claimed App Store release.

Separate products:
- https://resume.1ststep.ai/ is the AI Resume Builder landing page.
- https://app.1ststep.ai/ is the AI Resume Builder web app.

Business rules:
- 1stStep.ai does not guarantee revenue, rankings, funding, or app success.
- 1stStep.ai focuses on practical first versions, not bloated full builds.
- GitHub repo creation for client projects is locked until proposal acceptance and deposit/payment.
